fields.label: Marketplace Account
fields.description: The per-(Company, Marketplace) seller account this order belongs to. Resolved at SI creation from the EE order's marketplace_id + seller_id + Company.

fields.label: Company
fields.description: Fetched from marketplace_account for company_scope filtering and recon engine joins.

fields.label: Sales Invoice
fields.description: The ERPNext SI created at manifest from this EE shipment. One Map row per SI (per shipment, not per order). Split orders create multiple Map rows sharing ecs_easyecom_order_id but distinct ecs_easyecom_invoice_id.

fields.label: EE Order ID
fields.description: EE Order_id (internal; shared across a split order's shipments).

fields.label: EE Invoice ID
fields.description: EE shipment-level identifier — the SI is created per shipment and deduped on this. Autoname keys here so each Map row is name-stable to the EE shipment.

fields.label: Marketplace Order ID
fields.description: Marketplace-level identifier (from reference_code) — the recon engine's primary join key for Settlement Lines.

fields.label: Settlement Status
fields.description: Per §12.8: Forecast (SI created, awaiting settlement), Partial (some lines settled), Settled (fully reconciled), Disputed (recon engine flagged variance). Updated by the recon engine, not by §12 itself.

fields.label: Expected Settlement Date
fields.description: Forecast settlement date per marketplace's stated T+N payout cadence. Populated at Map insert when the Marketplace's settlement template is known; null otherwise. Filled in by the recon engine when settlement work ships.

fields.label: EE Payload Hash
fields.description: SHA-256 hex of the canonical-JSON EE order payload that produced this Map. Lets the recon engine and FDE diagnostics detect whether EE's data for this order has materially changed since first ingest.

fields.label: EE Order Payload
fields.description: Full JSON of the EE getAllOrders / getOrderDetails row that produced this SI. Stored readable (not gzipped) for audit + replay diagnostics.
